decision_log.decision: Extract frontend composables before extracting child components
decision_log.reason: The current AppPage has high shared state density, so logic boundaries must stabilize before moving scoped template and styles

decision_log.decision: Preserve backend facade import paths during module splits
decision_log.reason: Existing tests and plugin services depend on current module paths
